data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
- [ ] Detects 3 violation patterns: literal plugins/dso/scripts/, $PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/
- [ ] Excludes source commands targeting hooks/lib/ (not violations)
- [ ] Excludes files within plugins/dso/scripts/ directory (script-to-script refs, default mode only)
- [ ] Honors # shim-exempt: <reason> exemption comments (case-insensitive)
- [ ] Exits 0 when no violations found, exits 1 when violations detected
- [ ] Accepts file path args for targeted scans; defaults to full in-scope set when no args
- [ ] RED tests in test-check-shim-refs.sh and test-check-shim-refs-detection.sh turn GREEN
